text: Dinner at your mom's tonight or not?
She hasn't texted back. Let's just do pizza and stay in.
Works. I'll grab drinks on the way home.
You and Brian coming Sunday? Making a roast.
Yes, we'll be there at 5. Want me to bring anything?
Just bread. See you then.
You at mom's Sunday or working?
Might have to work. Why?
She's asking. Don't bail again.
Picking Sophie up or should I?
Sophie's in the pickup line, running five late.
Ice looks stable Eddington side this weekend.
Geaghan's Friday? Bruins are on.
Field's a GO for Saturday 9 AM.
Thanksgiving at our place, I've got the turkey.
Grabbing milk on the way home.
Thanks for watching them today Mom.
You handle the truck and gear, I've got food.
Inspector's back Thursday for the recheck.
Snack sign-up open for next three games.
Lights up the day after, usual time.
Recital tickets are set, four seats.
I salted your walk this morning.
Bait from Eddington Friday before we head out.
Bring the extra straps for the Hammond job.
Carpool meet Hannaford lot 8:15.
Christmas tamales, Abuela's recipe.
Truck payment posted, savings transfer cleared.
Luc left his cleats, I'll grab them tomorrow.
Augur's tuned up and ready.
You good on the panel room today?
Photo day next Saturday before the game.
Everyone good for Sunday dinner?
Pizza Friday from Pat's?
Dinner Sunday still on?
Splitting gas on PayPal.
Fish and chips on me if we win.
Great hustle today team.
Camping the last weekend of July.
Furnace guy comes Tuesday.
Furnace looked fine when I checked.
Tip-ups are in the garage, grab them.
OT Saturday if you want it.
